FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies

ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
